info.name: FX Trading App API
info.description:
Production-ready FX Trading App backend API built with NestJS.

## Features
- Multi-currency wallet management (NGN, USD, EUR, GBP, etc.)
- Real-time currency conversion and trading
- Email verification with OTP
- Transaction history with pagination
- Secure JWT authentication

## Authentication
All endpoints except `/auth/*` require JWT authentication.
Include the JWT token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your_access_token>
```


Contact Support:
 Name: API Support
 Email: support@fxtradingapp.com

request.description:
Creates a new user account and sends an OTP to the provided email for verification.
The user account will be unverified until the OTP is confirmed.

response.name: error - password validation
success

const token = candidates.find((t) => typeof t === "string" && t.trim().length > 0);
pm.expect(token, "bearer token not found in response (checked common paths)").to.be.a("string");

OTP expires after 10 minutes and can only be used once.

request.description:
Verifies user's email address using the OTP sent during registration.
OTP expires after 10 minutes and can only be used once.

Sends a new OTP to the user's email. Can be used to resend OTP if the previous one expired.
Previous OTPs will be invalidated.

exec: // Extract & store bearer token at COLLECTION scope only
// This test script intentionally avoids setting environment/global variables.
// If it isn't JSON, this will throw and fail in the next test.
pm.test("Login: capture bearer token into collection variable", function () {
pm.expect.fail("Response body is not valid JSON; cannot extract token.");
// Token path detection (supports common API shapes)
const token = candidates.find((t) => typeof t === "string" && t.trim().length > 0);
pm.expect(token, "bearer token not found in response (checked common paths)").to.be.a("string");

request.description:
Authenticates user and returns a JWT access token.
Email must be verified before login is allowed.
Returns the authenticated user's profile information
Returns all currency balances for the authenticated user

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

response.name: success - no balance

request.description:
Returns the wallet balance for a specific currency.
If the balance doesn't exist, it will be created with 0 balance.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description:
Add funds to a specific currency wallet.

**Idempotency**: Use the `idempotencyKey` to prevent duplicate transactions.
If a transaction with the same key exists, it will be returned instead of creating a new one.

Convert funds from one currency to another using real-time exchange rates.

The operation:
1. Fetches the current exchange rate
2. Deducts the amount from source currency
3. Credits the converted amount to target currency

**Note**: Distributed locks are used to prevent race conditions.

response.name: error - invalid currency
error - invalid amount

request.description:
Trade funds from one currency to another. Similar to convert but marked as TRADE transaction.
Uses real-time exchange rates and implements the same locking mechanism as convert.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

item.name: Get exchange rate between two currencies

request.description:
Returns the current exchange rate from one currency to another.

**Caching**: Rates are cached in Redis for 5 minutes to reduce API calls.
**Same Currency**: Returns rate of 1.0 for same currency pairs.

query.description: Filter by currency (matches fromCurrency or toCurrency)

request.description:
Returns paginated transaction history for the authenticated user.

**Filters**: type, currency, date range
**Sorting**: Most recent first (descending by createdAt)

request.description: Returns detailed information about a specific transaction

Returns aggregated statistics about the user's transactions.

Includes:
- Total transaction count
- Breakdown by transaction type
- Breakdown by currency (funded, spent, received amounts)
